title: ai-governance-checker: Pre-deployment governance audit for LLM system prompts against OWASP LLM Top 10 (2025), NIST AI RMF 1.0, and the EU AI Act
description: A Python CLI that audits an LLM system prompt against three governance frameworks at once: the OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications (2025 revision), NIST AI Risk Management Framework 1.0, and the EU AI Act high-risk-system checklist. Each rule cites the specific framework section it implements (e.g., LLM01:2025, NIST GOVERN-1.1, EU AI Act Art. 14). An optional LLM-as-a-judge module forwards the prompt to either Anthropic Claude or a local Ollama model for a structured second opinion; absence of every API key gracefully degrades to a rules-only run. The repository ships a 30-prompt labelled eval set (10 safe / 10 risky / 10 mixed) and reports real measured precision, recall, and F1 on a rules-only run.
